" THEY CALL IT CEASEFIRE WHILE GAZA STARVES, OCCUPIED PALESTINE BLEEDS, AND THE WORLD LOOKS AWAY | APRIL 27

 Aid / Crossings
The Gaza Crossing and Border Authority reported 214 trucks entered through Kerem Abu Salem: 134 commercial trucks, 12 aid trucks and 12 fuel trucks. For over 2 million people, this is not relief. It is controlled deprivation. They open the crossing when they choose, close it when they choose, then claim aid is flowing.

 Water Crisis
Gazas water collapse is catastrophic. Families are surviving on less than 10 litres per person daily, with some areas down to 2 litres. Before the war, access was around 80 litres. Water production has fallen from around 100,000 cubic metres per day to 35,000. Dirty water, sewage overflow, disease, insects and rats are now part of survival.

 Ceasefire Violations
Palestinian officials have cited 2,400+ serious israeli violations, including 921 shootings, 1,109 bombardments and attacks, 273 demolitions and 97 incursions. They call it a ceasefire. They keep firing.

 Imad Miqdad
Imad Miqdad was killed after israeli war criminal drones targeted his solar powered phone charging station in Sheikh Radwan. This was one of the few places civilians, journalists and medics could charge phones and stay connected. Destroy hospitals. Destroy water. Destroy roads. Destroy communication.

 Occupied Palestine / East Jerusalem
Occupied Palestine is being strangled in parallel. Since 7 October 2023, OCHA figures cited by UNRWA recorded 1,079 Palestinians killed in occupied Palestine, including East Jerusalem, at least 235 of them children, by 30 March 2026. Save the Children reported 685 Palestinian children displaced by settler violence in the first three months of 2026 alone. In al-Mughayyir near Ramallah, 14 year old Aws al-Naasan and 32 year old Jihad Abu Naim were killed during a settler attack near a school. This is raids, shootings, demolitions, illegal outposts, land seizures, settler terror and forced displacement working together.

 Dr Hussam Abu Safiya
Dr Hussam Abu Safiya, a Palestinian doctor from Gaza, remains in israeli detention without charge according to campaigners and rights advocates. April 28 is the feared key date being raised for his case. He treated the wounded after losing his own son. Then he was taken.

 Knesset Death Penalty Bill
The israeli Knesset passed a death penalty bill targeting Palestinians, advancing execution measures through occupation courts. So while Gaza is starved and bombed, Palestinian prisoners are threatened with execution through the same system that jails doctors without justice.

 Core Closing Line
They jail the doctors, threaten the prisoners, starve the civilians, cut the water, throttle the aid, kill the children, seize the land, build the settlements, then ask the world to call it democracy."

"We are shocked at Robert Jenricks claim on Sky News this morning that those who proclaim God is great (or Allahu Akbar) in public shouldbearrested. 

 This is a phrase recited publicly and privately by billions of Muslims around the world as they offer their solemn prayers and praise God. 

 Mr Jenricks claim that politicians should choose their words wisely during this crisis rings hollow as he reaches for Islamophobic rhetoric, the lowest common denominator for demagogues. 

 It only goes to show that institutional Islamophobia is alive and well in the Conservative Party.  As a prospective leader, Mr. Jenrick should be showing leadership, reassuring our communities when fear is palpable.  

Instead, by calling for a well-worn religious phrase to warrant arrest is the kind of divisive language we would come to expect peddled by sections of the media and politicians, has emboldened the far-right thugs we see on our streets today.  

He should apologise, fully retract his comments, and speak to ordinary Muslims to understand why his remarks are so outrageous. Rather than inflaming tensions, he should focus on ways to bring communities together.
